objective: AUTO_FOLDER_REFACTOR_BUGFIND: visibility refactor in features/servers/shared connection import parser to expose pairing descriptor fallback and URL-token base URL assumptions.
completedSlices: Added replayable Dart regression harness under features/servers/shared/connection_import_parser_regression_test.dart.
Made navivox://connect descriptor handling explicit via _isCorePairingDescriptorUri so malformed core descriptors do not fall through to generic token parsing.
Extracted _httpOriginFromHttpUri and fixed generic http(s) URLs with token query params to preserve the URL origin as baseUrl.
nextCandidates: features/servers/setup/navivox_connect_intent_source.dart source/provenance handling for String platform payloads vs Map payloads
core/protocol/endpoint/navivox_endpoint_uri.dart endpoint normalization edge cases around explicit default ports and path preservation
